# fixture-multi-agent

Golden file fixture for multi agent

## Multi-Agent System

This is a multi-agent system with the following agents:
- **reviewer**: reviews code
- **fixer**: fixes issues


## Quick Start

### Claude Code
```bash
cd fixture-multi-agent
# Claude Code will read CLAUDE.md and become the orchestrator
```

### Codex
```bash
cd fixture-multi-agent
# Codex will read CODEX.md and become the orchestrator
```

## Structure

- `CLAUDE.md` — Orchestrator instructions for Claude Code
- `CODEX.md` — Orchestrator instructions for Codex
- `orchestrator.md` — Orchestration rules and agent coordination
- `architecture/topology.yaml` — Agent graph topology
- `agents/` — Per-agent role definitions
- `agent_spec.yaml` — Full agent specification
- `policies/` — Policy rules (deny, ask, allow)
- `skills/` — Skill definitions
- `context/` — Background knowledge
- `docs/` — Documentation
- `meta.yaml` — Generation metadata

## Generated by Agent Factory
